No signature required."}},"notice":"Minimal Permit2 interface covering both SignatureTransfer (one-shot, witness-bound)         and AllowanceTransfer (a standing, time-boxed allowance a spender can draw against         repeatedly). The pool's direct funding paths use SignatureTransfer; the Concierge         mint queue uses AllowanceTransfer so a single signed permit at enqueue funds every         keeper-driven tranche without re-signing.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/IPermit2.sol":"IPermit2"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":15000},"remappings":[":@abdk/=lib/abdk-libraries-solidity/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":abdk-libraries-solidity/=lib/abdk-libraries-solidity/",":ds-test/=lib/permit2/lib/solmate/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-gas-snapshot/=lib/permit2/lib/forge-gas-snapshot/src/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":permit2/=lib/permit2/src/",":solmate/=lib/permit2/lib/solmate/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/IPermit2.sol":{"keccak256":"0x06fd721baa37c2174a56cff301d8ca6f671cae49bd942e770d3ec880e8dd4cce","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://1c545d16c075e8d1ca8c27e042c270de34f505661525c079de53bac1cfa39af7","dweb:/ipfs/QmXjQ2schyXW77uziMiH77GENiFrmswxaPUNcDjSSXxc7J"]}},"version":1}

permit(address,((address,uint160,uint48,.notice: Register a single-token allowance from a signed permit. Consumes the         signature once; the resulting `(amount, expiration)` allowance then backs         repeated `transferFrom` draws by `spender` until exhausted or expired.
Batch variant of `permit` covering several tokens with one signature.

transferFrom(address,address,uint160,add.notice: Draw `amount` of `token` from `from` to `to` against a standing allowance         previously granted to msg.sender via `permit`. No signature required.
